name: {{PROJECT_NAME}}
postStartCommand: sudo ssh-keygen -A && sudo /usr/sbin/sshd && git config --global credential.helper '!f() { echo username=git; echo password=$GIT_TOKEN; }; f' && git config --global user.email "$GIT_USER_EMAIL" && git config --global user.name "$GIT_USER_NAME" && [ -z "$(ls -A /workspace)" ] && git clone "https://${GIT_TOKEN}@$(echo $GIT_REPO | sed 's|https://||')" /workspace || true
